content.text:
Here are the results:

---

## (1) Complete list of files using `RepositoryPool`

1. `src/poetry/repositories/repository_pool.py` *(definition)*
2. `src/poetry/console/commands/debug/resolve.py`
3. `src/poetry/console/commands/init.py`
4. `src/poetry/console/commands/show.py`
5. `src/poetry/factory.py`
6. `src/poetry/installation/chef.py`
7. `src/poetry/installation/chooser.py`
8. `src/poetry/installation/executor.py`
9. `src/poetry/installation/installer.py`
10. `src/poetry/poetry.py`
11. `src/poetry/puzzle/provider.py`
12. `src/poetry/puzzle/solver.py`
13. `src/poetry/repositories/__init__.py`
14. `src/poetry/utils/isolated_build.py`
15. `src/poetry/version/version_selector.py`
16. `tests/conftest.py`
17. `tests/console/commands/self/conftest.py`
18. `tests/console/commands/test_init.py`
19. `tests/installation/conftest.py`
20. `tests/installation/test_chef.py`
21. `tests/installation/test_chooser.py`
22. `tests/installation/test_chooser_errors.py`
23. `tests/installation/test_executor.py`
24. `tests/installation/test_installer.py`
25. `tests/mixology/version_solver/conftest.py`
26. `tests/mixology/version_solver/test_with_lock.py`
27. `tests/plugins/test_plugin_manager.py`
28. `tests/puzzle/conftest.py`
29. `tests/puzzle/test_provider.py`
30. `tests/puzzle/test_solver.py`
31. `tests/repositories/test_repository_pool.py`
32. `tests/utils/test_isolated_build.py`

## (2) Total count

**32 files** (including the definition file itself; 31 if excluding it)

## (3) Tool calls made

| # | Tool | Arguments |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `Bash` | `command: "kdb refs src/poetry/repositories/repository_pool.py -s RepositoryPool --files"` |

That's it — a single `kdb refs` call was sufficient to find all references.
